questions.text: What is the primary role of the reference policy model in the PPO training loop?
options: To calculate a KL divergence constraint, preventing the active policy from shifting too far from baseline behaviors.
questions.correct_answer: To calculate a KL divergence constraint, preventing the active policy from shifting too far from baseline behaviors.
questions.explanation: The reference model is frozen and acts as a constraint baseline; the KL penalty keeps the active model's logits within safe boundaries.
